name: Kateb-e-Azam
overview: A shepherd who is the son of a fugitive and killed scribe of the court of Mu'awiya, came to see and write about the encounter between Shimr and Umar ibn Sa'd's forces with the army of Imam Husayn on the afternoon of Ashura.

trailers.title: 🎥 OFFICIAL TRAILER 📜 KATIB-E-AZAM | Drama Serial on Karbala History 🎤 Urdu / Hindi dubbing 📺 NigahTV
